summary: Major unblock cycle. #995 (governance catch-22) resolved — content agents unblocked after 5 consecutive blocked cycles. #1259 (swarm section audit) closed — site updated to '120 agents / 4 drivers'. #934 (v2.7.x announcement) closed as superseded. New site stats PR #1349 filed correcting event kinds 47→48, og/JSON-LD invariants 22→24, CLI heading 29→33. PR #1338 reviewed (Live Office README promotion — LGTM with agent count alignment note). Sprint refocused on #1260 (v2.9.x announcement) as sole active issue.

contentPipeline.notes: OWASP blog post at docs/blog/owasp-agentic-top10-agentguard.md — complete, ready for LinkedIn. v2.9.x announcement (#1260) now unblocked and assigned to marketing-launch-agent.

fixedThisCycle: PR #1349: Event kinds counter: 47 → 48 (UnknownCommandWarn added to schema)
PR #1349: Hero paragraph: '22 built-in safety checks' → '24 built-in safety checks'
PR #1349: CLI section heading: '29 CLI Commands' → '33 CLI Commands'
PR #1349: Added team-report, codex-init, gemini-init, goose-init, trust to CLI list
staleContent: PR #1338 agent count inconsistency: README says '100+', site says '120' — review comment posted, should align before merge

dataVerification.eventKinds: 48 — verified: grep -c EventKind packages/events/src/schema.ts (was 47; UnknownCommandWarn added)
dataVerification.cliCommands: 37 files; ~33 top-level visible commands (cloud-login.ts is a cloud subcommand)

closedThisCycle.title: v2.7.x announcement
closedThisCycle.note: Superseded by #1260. Too far behind v2.9.1 to be useful.

closedThisCycle.title: Governance catch-22 content agent blocker
closedThisCycle.note: Resolved upstream. Content pipeline unblocked after 5 cycles.

closedThisCycle.title: Swarm section audit — '26 agents stale'
closedThisCycle.note: Closed — site updated to 120 agents / 4 governed drivers.

active.title: v2.9.0/v2.9.1 announcement content
active.note: Assigned to marketing-launch-agent. Key angles: wildcard policy fix (action '*' now covers shell.exec, was a silent gap), safe-subshell allowlist, security upgrade CTA for anyone using wildcard policies before v2.9.0.

prQueue.notes: #1338 Live Office README (EM-reviewed: LGTM, needs agent count alignment '100+' → '120' to match site); #1349 site stats sync (new this cycle, site-only PR, ci-skip-site.yml provides required checks)

escalations: MEDIUM: OWASP blog post complete at docs/blog/owasp-agentic-top10-agentguard.md — needs human to publish to LinkedIn. No technical blocker.
LOW: PR #1338 — agent count inconsistency (README '100+' vs site '120'). Review comment posted.
LOW: PR #1349 site stats — awaiting CI. Should auto-merge once ci-skip-site.yml checks pass.
productInsights: Content agents unblocked for first time in 5 cycles — marketing-launch-agent can now work on #1260 without manual intervention.

v2.9.1 is current release. Wildcard policy fix is the best marketing angle: users who wrote 'action: "*"' thought they were blocking everything, but shell.exec was not covered until v2.9.0. Security-angle CTA drives upgrades.
New adapters shipped: codex-cli, gemini-cli, goose — now reflected in site CLI section (PR #1349). Widens 'works with' story.
Event kinds now 48 (was 47). Recurring stat drift pattern continues — recommend build-time sync script to auto-patch site/index.html from source counts at deploy time.

dogfoodReport.status: clean — no governance issues this run. git, gh pr, gh issue, and site file writes all executed without denial. ci-skip-site.yml correctly allows site-only PR creation without full CI gate.
